Implemented the WebAuthn event publisher fix.

What changed:
- Updated `config/src/main/java/org/springframework/security/config/annotation/web/configurers/WebAuthnConfigurer.java`
- The WebAuthn-specific `ProviderManager` now looks up the configured `AuthenticationEventPublisher` from shared objects or beans and applies it via `setAuthenticationEventPublisher`.
- This prevents WebAuthn authentication from falling back to `ProviderManager`’s default `NullEventPublisher`.

Validation:
- Added a temporary focused regression test to reproduce the bug.
- Confirmed the test failed before the fix because the configured publisher was not invoked.
- Applied the fix.
- Confirmed the focused test passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary test changes as requested.

- `./gradlew :spring-security-config:test --tests org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.configurers.WebAuthnConfigurerTests`
- Result: `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

- No commit was created.
- The temporary regression test changes were restored.
- There is an unrelated existing modification in `buildSrc/src/main/groovy/test-compile-target-jdk25.gradle` that I did not modify or restore.
